title: Track TODO and FIXME comments that do not contain a reference to a person
description: Track "TODO" and "FIXME" comments that do not contain a reference to a personAnalyze your codeintentionality-completemaintainabilityCode SmellconventionWhy is this an issue?TODO and FIXME comments are typically intended to be short-lived; they are placeholders and reminders that programmers leave for themselves. Unfortunately, even with the best of intentions, those comments are not always acted on and removed in a timely manner. Thus, they can become mysterious, lingering cruft in a code base, reducing both readability and understand-ability.This rule flags all FIXME and TODO comments that do not have an attribution matching the specified regular expression immediately after the FIXME or TODO.
recommendation: Remove the problematic code and refactor as needed.

checks.message: TODO/FIXME comment without person reference detected. Include responsible person or email for accountability.
